title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Vacation
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to a minimum of 20 days of annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. This entitlement is pro-rated for part-time employees based on their working hours. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the company’s HR portal at least four weeks in advance. Your manager will review the request and confirm approval based on team needs and workload. It is important to plan your leave early to ensure that your time off does not conflict with critical business operations.
